mapper.select: SELECT * FROM market_bar_daily WHERE product_id = #{productId} ORDER BY trade_date DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO market_bar_daily ( product_id, trade_date, open_price, high_price, low_price, close_price, volume, amount, prev_close, source, created_at ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{tradeDate}, #{openPrice}, #{highPrice}, #{lowPrice}, #{closePrice}, #{volume}, #{amount}, #{prevClose}, #{source}, NOW() ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE open_price = VALUES(open_price), high_price = VALUES(high_price), low_price = VALUES(low_price), close_price = VALUES(close_price), volume = VALUES(volume), amount = VALUES(amount), prev_close = VALUES(prev_close)
mapper.update: UPDATE market_bar_daily SET open_price = #{openPrice}, high_price = #{highPrice}, low_price = #{lowPrice}, close_price = #{closePrice}, volume = #{volume}, amount = #{amount}, prev_close = #{prevClose} WHERE id = #{id}
